current.headline: Australia vs Egypt could be decided by the first pressure signal
current.summary: Salah's first shot, Australia's first clean look, the first card, or an early goal each tells a different story about how open the knockout tie becomes.

items.headline: Salah's first shot on target remains Egypt's early-match pressure marker
items.summary: If Egypt settle quickly, Salah getting the first dangerous action becomes realistic; if Australia disrupt the rhythm, cards or an Australian shot can arrive first.
